bls_combo_guidance.eyebrow: Not Sure This Is The Right Class?
bls_combo_guidance.title: Need BLS with another cert for the same renewal cycle?
bls_combo_guidance.body: If you also need ACLS, PALS, or workplace CPR options, compare the related training paths before you book so you do not end up registering for the wrong level of care.

acls_combo_guidance.eyebrow: Not Sure This Is The Right Class?
acls_combo_guidance.title: Need ACLS together with BLS or PALS?
acls_combo_guidance.body: ACLS is usually paired with BLS and sometimes with PALS depending on your role. Use the related hubs first if you are deciding between adult-only, peds-inclusive, or blended renewal needs.

pals_combo_guidance.eyebrow: Not Sure This Is The Right Class?
pals_combo_guidance.title: Need PALS along with ACLS or BLS?
pals_combo_guidance.body: PALS is often booked alongside ACLS or BLS for pediatric and emergency care teams. Compare the companion hubs first if you are trying to line up multiple certifications without duplicating the wrong class.

tabs.description: Instructor-led BLS for new students or anyone whose card has expired. Best fit when you want the standard classroom path.

tabs.description: For currently certified providers who need a focused recertification class instead of the full initial course.

tabs.description: Complete the online HeartCode portion first, then book a short in-person skills session to finish your certification.

tabs.label: First Aid + CPR + AED
tabs.description: The broadest Heartsaver option for workplaces and general certification needs, covering first aid, CPR, and AED skills together.
tabs.description_short: The broadest Heartsaver option for workplaces and general certification needs, covering first aid, CPR, and AED skills together.
tabs.description_more: Choose this path when you need the most complete workplace-friendly Heartsaver option. Public dates can include both traditional in-person classes and blended online-plus-skills sessions, and each session row shows the actual format.
tabs.full_schedule_label: See full Heartsaver First Aid CPR AED schedule

tabs.label: CPR + AED Only
tabs.description: Best when you need CPR and AED training without the added first aid component.
tabs.description_short: Best when you need CPR and AED training without the added first aid component.
tabs.description_more: This is the leaner Heartsaver option for teams and individuals who do not need the first aid module. Private or onsite-only sessions are excluded from the public hub, so only bookable public inventory should appear here.
tabs.full_schedule_label: See full Heartsaver CPR AED schedule

tabs.label: Pediatric First Aid
tabs.description: A childcare-focused option covering pediatric first aid, CPR, and AED content for schools, camps, and caregiver teams.
tabs.description_short: A childcare-focused option covering pediatric first aid, CPR, and AED content for schools, camps, and caregiver teams.
tabs.description_more: Use this tab for childcare, camp, school, and caregiver requirements. If the visible sessions are blended, the row badges will show that clearly so the tab does not mislead anyone into expecting a classroom-only format.
name_contains: Heartsaver® Pediatric First Aid CPR AED
